tasks.name: Create activity icon mapping utility
tasks.purpose: Create a utility function that maps activity types (lesson, quiz, assessment, presentation) to their corresponding Lucide icons and colors for visual differentiation

constraints: Must use discriminated union for type-safe mapping
Icon/color combinations must be distinct and accessible
Follow existing icon patterns from CourseDashboardClient
Cross-feature dependency: requires S2072.I3.F1.T1 (activity types) to be complete

tasks.input_state: Activity types defined in S2072.I3.F1 (ActivityItem discriminated union). No icon mapping utility exists.
tasks.output_state: activity-icon-map.ts created with getActivityIcon function returning { icon: ReactNode, colorClass: string }. Function uses discriminated union for type safety.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Icon mapping file exists. Function returns correct icon/color for each activity type. Typecheck passes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function getActivityIcon' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/utils/activity-icon-map.ts && grep -q 'BookOpen\|HelpCircle\|ClipboardCheck\|Presentation' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/utils/activity-icon-map.ts && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create activity item component
tasks.purpose: Create individual activity item component displaying icon, title, timestamp, and optional link with timeline visual (vertical line with dot)

constraints: Client component with 'use client' directive
Timeline visual using Tailwind border-left and absolute positioning
Timestamps formatted as relative time (e.g., '2 hours ago')
Must be accessible with proper ARIA labels
Links only rendered when activity has href
Cross-feature dependency: requires S2072.I3.F1.T1 (activity types) to be complete

tasks.input_state: Activity types exist from S2072.I3.F1. Icon mapping exists from T1. No activity item component exists.
tasks.output_state: activity-item.tsx created with ActivityItemProps interface and ActivityItem component. Component displays icon, title, relative timestamp, and optional link. Timeline visual implemented with left border and dot.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Activity item component exists. Renders icon, title, timestamp, and optional link. Timeline visual displays correctly. Typecheck passes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function ActivityItem' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'formatDistanceToNow' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-item.tsx && grep -q 'border-l-2' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-item.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create empty state component
tasks.purpose: Create engaging empty state component with friendly message and CTA when user has no recent activities

dependencies: Activity icon from lucide-react (Sparkles or Zap)
constraints: Follow empty state best practices from research (headline + explanation + illustration + single CTA)
Use friendly, encouraging language (not depressing or accusatory)
Include single prominent CTA button
Reference: perplexity-dashboard-empty-states-ux.md research

tasks.input_state: Activity item component exists. No empty state component exists.
tasks.output_state: activity-empty-state.tsx created with engaging message, icon, and CTA button. Component follows empty state UX best practices.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Empty state component exists. Contains headline, explanation, icon, and single CTA. Uses encouraging language. Typecheck passes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function ActivityEmptyState' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-empty-state.tsx && grep -q 'Sparkles\|Zap' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/activity-empty-state.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create recent activity feed component
tasks.purpose: Create main activity feed widget component with card wrapper, header, and list of activity items or empty state

constraints: Client component with 'use client' directive
Accept activities prop (ActivityItem[])
Render empty state when activities.length === 0
Render activity items in list with proper semantics
Card header with 'Recent Activity' title
Responsive design (mobile-friendly)
Cross-feature dependency: requires S2072.I3.F1.T3 (dashboard loader with activities) to be complete

tasks.input_state: Activity types, item component, and empty state component exist. No main feed component exists.
tasks.output_state: recent-activity-feed.tsx created with RecentActivityFeed component. Component accepts activities prop, renders card with header, displays list or empty state.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Recent activity feed component exists. Accepts activities prop. Renders card with header. Shows activity list or empty state based on data. Typecheck passes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'export function RecentActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'Card\|CardHeader\|CardTitle' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && grep -q 'activities.length === 0' apps/web/app/home/(user)/_components/recent-activity-feed.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add activity feed to dashboard page
tasks.purpose: Integrate RecentActivityFeed component into dashboard page, passing activities data from dashboard loader

constraints: Page must remain a Server Component
Fetch activities via dashboard loader
Pass activities as prop to RecentActivityFeed
Place widget in appropriate grid slot (follow existing layout patterns)
Handle loading/error states gracefully
Cross-feature dependencies: requires S2072.I3.F1.T3 (dashboard loader) and S2072.I1.F2 (grid layout) to be complete

tasks.input_state: Dashboard page exists with empty PageBody. RecentActivityFeed component exists. Dashboard loader provides activities data from S2072.I3.F1.
tasks.output_state: Dashboard page imports and renders RecentActivityFeed. Component receives activities from loader. Widget displays in grid layout.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Dashboard page renders RecentActivityFeed. Activities data passed from loader. Widget visible on /home route. Typecheck passes.
tasks.verification_command: grep -q 'RecentActivityFeed' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && grep -q 'activities' apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add hover effects to activity items
tasks.purpose: Enhance activity items with subtle hover effects (background color change, cursor pointer) for better interactivity and visual feedback

constraints: Use Tailwind hover classes (no custom CSS)
Effects should be subtle and non-distracting
Maintain accessibility (no relying on color alone)
Consistent with existing hover patterns in the app

tasks.input_state: Activity item component exists without hover effects.
tasks.output_state: Activity items have subtle hover effects (background change, shadow). Effects are smooth and accessible.
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Hover classes added to activity items. Visual feedback present on hover. Typecheck passes.
